title: Hinkin Law LLC
html:
Stub. A law firm Yahir interviewed with in early 2025 (post-China, pre-graduation), positioning himself for an AI-tools-for-social-media role.

What we know

  • Founder = Joshua Hinkin, who has authored a book Yahir began reading as interview prep (2025 01 03 how to get hired by hunkin law llc).
  • Yahir's pitch: data-driven CS background + AI captioning workflows + multi-language video repurposing.
  • Likely Grants Pass / Oregon-area firm given Yahir's "Grants Pass roots" pitch leaning.
